assertions.title: Only prefixed env vars are recognized

steps.action: Run unpaywall search with only SEARCH_PAPER_UNPAYWALL_EMAIL set
steps.expected: CLI uses SEARCH_PAPER_UNPAYWALL_EMAIL and returns one result

steps.action: Run core search with SEARCH_PAPER_CORE_API_KEY explicitly empty
steps.expected: Explicitly empty prefixed variables stay empty and omit auth headers

assertions.title: Global config fallback stays predictable while legacy env files are ignored

steps.action: Run unpaywall search with temp `HOME` global config providing `unpaywall_email` and a legacy `SEARCH_PAPER_ENV_FILE` also set
steps.expected: Global config provides the email while the legacy env-file path is ignored safely
steps.observed: exit 0; server observed email=global@example.com; stderr warning present=False

steps.action: Run sources --format json from a cwd containing its own .env while temp `HOME` global config is present
steps.expected: cwd .env is ignored and the run continues to use only process env plus global config

steps.action: Run unpaywall search with SEARCH_PAPER_ENV_FILE set to a missing path while cwd `.env` exists
steps.expected: CLI ignores the missing legacy env file, does not crash, and does not fall back to cwd/repo env files
steps.observed: exit 0; total=1; stderr=''; local server hit=True

steps.action: Run sources --source ieee --format json with IEEE enabled through global config and ACM through process env
steps.expected: Per-key merge keeps JSON stdout valid while reflecting both configuration sources

steps.action: Run sources --format json with an explicit env file containing a malformed line
steps.expected: Warning is emitted only on stderr and stdout remains parseable JSON

assertions.title: Secrets are never echoed in diagnostics

steps.action: Run sources --format json with sentinel secrets in both env vars and a malformed cwd .env line
steps.expected: CLI exits cleanly and neither stdout nor stderr contains the sentinel secret value

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked, 0 skipped.
